name: Persian Pumpkin Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 pinch saffron dissolved in 1/4 cup warm water, optional
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat.
2. Add about 1 and 1/2 cups of water.
3. Stir in tomato paste, turmeric, cinnamon, saffron (if using), salt, and pepper.
4. Add chopped onion and cook until onions are translucent.
5. Cover and simmer at a low temperature for about 1 to 1-1/2 hours, or until the meat is very tender.
6. If necessary, add more water so that the total liquid level remains below the level of the meat.
7. Seed and slice the pumpkin into 2-inch pieces; peel if desired.
8. Brown the pumpkin slices on both sides in corn oil over medium heat.
9. Add the pumpkin to the pot and cover. Cook for an additional 20-30 minutes until tender but not falling apart.
10. Prunes should be added during the last 5 minutes of cooking, allowing them to warm through without breaking down.
11. Serve hot over basmati rice.
